{{Quote|I have a few friends on the station that are collecting information regarding all the recent Imperial activity. One is in Hangar Bay 1 and the other is in the Cloning Facility. Go see what they uncovered and report back to me.|[[Garek]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:HtA" />}}
'''Rund Jesela''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he reside onboard [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. During that time, he was the director of the station's [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] facility. Furthermore, he was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative, collecting information regarding [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] activity for [[Agent/Legends|Agent]] [[Garek]].<ref name="SWG:HtA" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Garek encountered a spacer who was seeking to help the Rebellion. To evaluate this new recruit, the Rebel agent tasked the spacer to retrieve [[Datacard/Legends|datadisks]] with sensitive information from Rund Jesela and [[Adery Shrial]], another Rebel [[Spy/Legends|spy]]. Although the datadisks only contained [[Grandma Drake]]'s soup recipes, the spacer achieved the objective successfully and was later assigned to a real mission.<ref name="SWG:HtA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rund Jesela appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:HtA" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Rund Jesela was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:HtA" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
